nodes.name: 群織雀
nodes.summary: 群織雀（Sociable weaver，学名 Philetairus socius），主要分布于北開普省。

nodes.name: 北開普省
nodes.summary: 北開普省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括高山雨燕、Damara tern、Karoo thrush等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in South Africa, Namibia, and Botswana, but its range is centered within the Northern Cape Province of South Africa.{{cite book|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20061015081716/http://web.uct.ac.za/depts/stats/adu/pdf/800.pdf|archive-date=2006-10-15|last1= Mendelsohn|first1= J.M.|title= The Atlas of Southern African Birds|year= 1997|publisher= BirdLife South Africa|chapter-url= http://web.uct.ac.za/depts/stats/adu/pdf/800.pdf|last2= Anderson|first2= M.D.|editor= J.A
